## Covid-19 Tracking {.slide-project-mdrd .section-end}

Data from The Covid Tracking Project, compiled in real time to understand the US COVID-19 testing effort and the outbreak's effects on communities it touched.

::: notes
PROJECT: you'll be exploring data from **The Covid Tracking Project**. With each week's lessons, we'll be building techniques to get better at asking questions about and exploring what this (sometimes messy, very real) data can show.

The process we're following will be pretty clear once we get into it. By working on this project over multiple weeks, you'll **<i>gain skills</i>** as you **<i>apply them</i>**, all the while **<i>practicing</i>** as you go. ✻
:::
